title: Names of companies
doc_html:
§550.32. Names of companies

            A captive insurance company shall adopt a name for the captive insurance company only after such name is approved by the commissioner.

            Acts 2025, No. 313, §2.
doc_text:
§550.32. Names of companies
A captive insurance company shall adopt a name for the captive insurance company
only after such name is approved by the commissioner.
Acts 2025, No. 313, §2.
